== Leeku ♀ ==
The world's most celebrated princess. She is worshipped by thousands of fans!

=== Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Leeku, Complete [[Yamato]] Key Clue "New Year Concert"

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 9 letters back and forth, Leeku will arrive at [[Home Base]] and gift Makeup Box (Toner +50, unlocks more Avatar categories).

===★☆☆ > ★★★===
After 9 letters back and forth, Leeku will move in with her minion, Stan.

==Rent==
[[File:Leeku rent.png|frameless|left]]

Leeku rent is collected on '''Friday''' and appears as a Violin to the left of her stage (Lv. 10 rent appears as a gene segment). 

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Guanery's Violin|blue}}

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Leeku's Guitar|green}}

 '''Lv. 10 Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Sealed Beast Gene Segment}} After obtaining 5 of these, it will no longer appear.

{{clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn W-tads!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|100 W-tads
|-
|★★
|100 W-tads
|-
|★★★
|100 W-tads
|-
|★★★★
|200 W-tads
|-
|★★★★★
|200 W-tads
|-
|★★★★★★
|300 W-tads
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Peacock Clock}}{{Relink|Peacock Clock}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Guanery's Violin}}{{Relink|Guanery's Violin}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Crystal Piano}}{{Relink|Crystal Piano}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Marquis Bell}}{{Relink|Marquis Bell}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Lyre of Hermes}}{{Relink|Lyre of Hermes}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|King's Gayageum}}{{Relink|King's Gayageum}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Royal Celtic Harp}}{{Relink|Royal Celtic Harp}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Horn of Heimdall}}{{Relink|Horn of Heimdall}}
|}

==Leeku's New Album==
When your Idol releases a new album, you cannot call yourself a genuine fan if you don't buy thousands of copies at once!

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||ART +5||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +30s
|-
|2||180||2k||ART +10||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +1m
|-
|3||190||4.5k||ART +15||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +1m30s
|-
|4||200||8k||ART +20||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +2m
|-
|5||210||12.5k||ART +25||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +2m30s
|-
|6||220||18k||ART +30||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +3m
|-
|7||230||24.5k||ART +35||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +3m30s
|-
|8||240||32k||ART +40||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +4m
|-
|9||250||40.5k||ART +45||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +4m30s
|-
|10||260||50k||ART +50||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m
|-
|11||270||60.5k||ART +55||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +5m30s
|-
|12||285||72k||ART +60||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +6m
|-
|13||300||84.5k||ART +65||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +6m30s
|-
|14||315||98k||ART +70||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +7m
|-
|15||330||112k||ART +75||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +7m30s
|-
|16||345||123k||ART +80||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +8m
|-
|17||360||144k||ART +85||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +8m30s
|-
|18||375||162k||ART +90||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +9m
|-
|19||390||180k||ART +95||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +9m30s
|-
|20||400||200k||ART +100||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +10m
|-
|21||420||220k||ART +105||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +10m30s
|-
|22||440||242k||ART +110||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +11m
|-
|23||460||264k||ART +115||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +11m30s
|-
|24||480||285k||ART +120||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +12m
|-
|25||500||309k||ART +125||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +12m30s
|-
|26||520||333k||ART +130||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +13m
|-
|27||540||357k||ART +135||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +13m30s
|-
|28||560||381k||ART +140||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +14m
|-
|29||580||405k||ART +145||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +14m30s
|-
|30||600||429k||ART +150||Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +15m
|}

==Commander ==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Leeku's New Album is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +10
|-
|2||4k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +20
|-
|3||6k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +30
|-
|4||8k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +40
|-
|5||10k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +50
|-
|6||12k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +60
|-
|7||14k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +70
|-
|8||16k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +80
|-
|9||18k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +90
|-
|10||20k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|11||22k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +110
|-
|12||24k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +120
|-
|13||26k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +130
|-
|14||28k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +140
|-
|15||30k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +150
|-
|16||32k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +160
|-
|17||34k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +170
|-
|18||36k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +180
|-
|19||38k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +190
|-
|20||40k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|21||42k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +210
|-
|22||44k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +220
|-
|23||46k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +230
|-
|24||48k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +240
|-
|25||50k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +250
|-
|26||55k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +260
|-
|27||60k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +270
|-
|28||65k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +280
|-
|29||70k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +290
|-
|30||75k||Angel Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Stan in battle, Troop HP +300
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Leeku specializes in '''Angel Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Angel is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

==Minion - Stan==
To stans, their idol means the world. They can give everything to their idols without hesitation...

===Special Ability - Idol Worship ===
Per 10 Stans in battle, Troop HARD Stats +3 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Stans!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Peacock Clock}}<br>{{relink|Peacock Clock}}
|HP +1%
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Guanery's Violin}}<br>{{relink|Guanery's Violin}}
|HP +1% 
|DEF +1%
|ATK +1%
|RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Crystal Piano}}<br>{{relink|Crystal Piano}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Marquis Bell}}<br>{{relink|Marquis Bell}}
|HP +2%
|DEF +2%
|ATK +2%
|RUSH +2%
|All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Lyre of Hermes}}<br>{{relink|Lyre of Hermes}}
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|King's Gayageum}}<br>{{relink|King's Gayageum}}
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Royal Celtic Harp}}<br>{{relink|Royal Celtic Harp}}
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Horn of Heimdall}}<br>{{relink|Horn of Heimdall}}
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|RUSH +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
[[Category:Yamato]]
[[Category:Friday Rent]]
[[Category:Angel Minions]]
[[Category:Angel Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:ART Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HP Boost]]
[[Category:Minion HARD Boost]]
